nodes.name: Execute Workflow Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives the accumulated daily context from the orchestrator. Triggered only when MEDIA_MODE=full_video is active.

nodes.name: Full Video Generation (not available in v1)
nodes.notes: MEDIA_MODE=full_video is not supported in v1. No current provider (openai, google) has fullVideoGeneration capability. This node returns a graceful failed asset with captions derived from the video script. See docs/architecture/full-video-mode.md for the full design and how to enable this mode when a capable provider becomes available.

main.node: Full Video Generation (not available in v1)
